parameters.query: INSERT INTO ingest_runs (id, pipeline_name, trigger_type, status, items_found, items_created, items_updated, items_failed, started_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, 'discovery-v1', 'manual', 'RUNNING', 0, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id AS run_id, pipeline_name, trigger_type, status, started_at;

SELECT '{{ $json.run_id }}'::text AS run_id, id AS source_id, name AS source_name, platform, source_kind, url, trust_score, discovery_method, notes FROM sources WHERE is_active = true AND url IS NOT NULL AND lower(COALESCE(platform, 'website')) IN ('website', 'web') ORDER BY trust_score DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 25;

INSERT INTO sources (id, platform, source_kind, name, url, is_public, is_active, trust_score, account_handle, external_id, discovery_method, notes, created_at, updated_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, 'website', 'WEBSITE', {{ $json.candidate_label ? "'" + $json.candidate_label.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ ($json.candidate_url || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', false, false, {{ Number($json.discovery_confidence || 20) }}, NULL, NULL, 'discovery-v1', '{{ ($json.discovery_notes || "DISCOVERY_REVIEW_REQUIRED").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', NOW(), NOW() WHERE {{ $json.insertable && $json.candidate_url ? 'true' : 'false' }} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sources WHERE lower(url) = lower('{{ ($json.candidate_url || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}')) RETURNING id, url, name, trust_score;

UPDATE ingest_runs SET status = 'FINISHED', items_found = {{ $json.items_found || 0 }}, items_created = {{ $json.items_created || 0 }}, items_updated = 0, items_failed = {{ $json.items_failed || 0 }}, finished_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), log_text = {{ $json.log_text ? "'" + $json.log_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }} WHERE id = '{{ $json.run_id }}' RETURNING id, status, items_found, items_created, items_failed, finished_at;
